name: Grandmothers' Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch round cake pan.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together cocoa powder, boiling water, cake flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, baking soda, butter, brown sugar, eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle bittersweet chocolate on top of the batter.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
